samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse detection module.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="IDLE">Initial state.</state>
        <state id="PULSE_START">State after detecting a rising edge.</state>
        <state id="PULSE_END">State after detecting a falling edge.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="state" width_description="[2:0]">Register to store the current state.</reg>
        <wire id="next_state" width_description="[2:0]">Wire to store the next state.</wire>
        <always id="state_update" sensitivity_list="posedge clk or negedge rst_n">
            <if id="reset_condition" condition="~rst_n">
                <assign id="initial_state_assignment" target="state" value="IDLE"/>
                <assign id="initial_output_assignment" target="data_out" value="0"/>
            </if>
            <else>
                <assign id="state_transition_assignment" target="state" value="next_state"/>
                <assign id="output_assignment" target="data_out" value="(state == PULSE_END ? 1 : 0)"/>
            </else>
        </always>
        <always id="next_state_logic" sensitivity_list="state or data_in">
            <case id="state_case" expression="state">
                <item id="idle_to_pulse_start" case_value="IDLE">
                    <if id="rising_edge_detection" condition="data_in == 1">
                        <assign id="transition_to_pulse_start" target="next_state" value="PULSE_START"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="stay_in_idle" target="next_state" value="IDLE"/>
                    </else>
                </item>
                <item id="pulse_start_to_pulse_end" case_value="PULSE_START">
                    <if id="falling_edge_detection" condition="data_in == 0">
                        <assign id="transition_to_pulse_end" target="next_state" value="PULSE_END"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="stay_in_pulse_start" target="next_state" value="PULSE_START"/>
                    </else>
                </item>
                <item id="pulse_end_to_idle" case_value="PULSE_END">
                    <if id="waiting_for_next_pulse" condition="data_in == 1">
                        <assign id="wait_for_next_pulse" target="next_state" value="PULSE_START"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="return_to_idle" target="next_state" value="IDLE"/>
                    </else>
                </item>
                <default id="default_case">
                    <assign id="default_next_state" target="next_state" value="IDLE"/>
                </default>
            </case>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
</module>
